diagnosis.final_diagnosis: Cochlear and cochleovestibular nerve aplasia on the left side and incomplete partition on the right side
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The diagnosis was based on HRCT and MRI scans showing no signal on the left cochlear region and narrow internal auditory canal on the left side, and a wide basal turn with no separation between middle and apical turns on the right side, resembling Mondini deformity. Vestibular anomalies such as large vestibular aqueduct and dilated vestibule were also observed on the right side.
